h694ead08g1de4g4945ga89bg49009a65a7d7: A tavern set alight. A Grand Duke trapped inside. And we did nothing.
ha5e2fb55gfcdeg4490g8a70geb042130cc33: The Gauntlet always did think me a failure. Seems I've proven her right.
